title: AdminGui
description: Clean, powerful admin GUI for Minecraft servers that replaces messy commands with an intuitive interface.
body:
# AdminGui

**AdminGui** is a powerful, modern admin GUI plugin designed to replace messy moderation commands with a fast, intuitive interface built for real staff workflows.

Open the entire admin panel with a single command and manage players, moderation, teleportation, inventories, vanish, and server controls — all without cluttering chat.

---

## Command

### `/admingui`
Opens the main admin GUI.

From here you can:
- Select a target player via hidden input (not sent to chat)
- Navigate through all admin tools using categorized menus
- Use back buttons on every menu for fast navigation

---

## Main Features

### Player & Punishment Tools
- Ban, TempBan (with time picker), Unban
- Kick with custom reason
- Mute, TempMute, Unmute
- Warn players with custom messages
- Confirmation screens for destructive actions

### Vanish System
- Self-only vanish toggle
- Completely hidden from players and tab list
- Action bar indicator while vanished
- Chat disabled while vanished (commands allowed)
- Vanished players cannot be messaged (`/msg`, `/w`, `/tell`)

### Inventory Management
- Live inventory editor (real-time)
- Supports armor and offhand editing
- Safe editor GUI (does not open target’s real inventory)
- EnderChest viewer (read-only)
- EnderChest editor (live)

### Teleportation
- Teleport to target
- Teleport target to you
- Teleport to spawn
- Teleport to specific coordinates via input prompt
- Back system that works after teleports and deaths

### Moderation Tools
- Freeze and unfreeze players
- Prevents movement and block breaking
- Disables fall damage while frozen
- Player inspection (health, food, gamemode, location)

### Chat & Server Controls
- Global chat mute toggle
- Silent chat clear
- Admin broadcasts and announcements via input prompts
- Server time, weather, and difficulty controls

### World Tools
- Kill mobs by category (all / hostile / passive)
- Basic lag and entity information

---

## Compatibility
- Tested on **Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11**
- Paper / Spigot supported (Paper recommended)

AdminGui is built to be fast, safe, and practical — everything staff needs, nothing they don’t.
